name: MEDIFAST INC
summary: Medifast, Inc. is a 40+ year old health and wellness company operating a coach-guided lifestyle system focused on metabolic health and weight loss. The company sells scientifically developed nutrition products under the OPTA VIA brand through a network of approximately 16,100 independent coaches. Its flagship 5 & 1 Plan and product lines including OPTA VIA ASCEND and OPTA VIA ACTIVE address weight loss, fat burn, and metabolic dysfunction.

products.name: OPTA VIA 5 & 1 Plan
products.description: Clinically proven weight loss plan combining nutrition products with coach-guided habit creation framework.

products.name: OPTA VIA ASCEND
products.description: Innovative product line addressing metabolic health needs of clients.

products.name: OPTA VIA ACTIVE
products.description: Product line designed to support active clients in achieving metabolic health goals.

products.name: Essentials line
products.description: Popular nutrition product line for weight loss and healthy lifestyle support.

products.name: Habits of Health Transformational System
products.description: Proprietary system providing steps toward a sustainable healthy lifestyle.

products.name: Premier+
products.description: Refreshed auto-ship program with tiered pricing discounts and improved coach compensation structure, launched July 2025.

products.name: EDGE program
products.description: Coach business-building program emphasizing progressive behaviors, rewards, and recognition launched in 2025.
